---
title: "DLG4NLP Keynote @ NAACL 2022: GNN for NLP (Zheng Zhang)"
description: "Zheng Zhang's keynote on graph neural networks for NLP — DGL, text-graph mapping, coref, discourse, KBQA. The future is neural+symbolic."
author: "synesis"
date: "2022-07-19"
categories: [NLP, knowledge graphs, conference, NAACL]
image: cover.jpg
---

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![DLG4NLP @ NAACL 2022. Image from [DLG4NLP workshop](https://dlg4nlp-workshop.github.io/dlg4nlp-naacl22).](cover.jpg)

![Slide from the [DLG4NLP workshop](https://dlg4nlp-workshop.github.io/dlg4nlp-naacl22).](02.jpg)

![Slide from the [DLG4NLP workshop](https://dlg4nlp-workshop.github.io/dlg4nlp-naacl22).](03.jpg)

![Slide from the [DLG4NLP workshop](https://dlg4nlp-workshop.github.io/dlg4nlp-naacl22).](04.jpg)

![Slide from the [DLG4NLP workshop](https://dlg4nlp-workshop.github.io/dlg4nlp-naacl22).](05.jpg)

![Slide from the [DLG4NLP workshop](https://dlg4nlp-workshop.github.io/dlg4nlp-naacl22).](06.jpg)
:::
Professor Zheng Zhang (New York University, Amazon Web Services (AWS)) gave a very insightful keynote talk at DLG4NLP Workshop @ NAACL2022 on caling out GNN Applications for NLP:

* Development of Deep Graph Library (DGL).
* Mapping between text and graphs.
* Two discourse tasks: coreference resolution and discourse relations.
* KBQA.

I'm also in strong agreement with Professor Zhang that the future belongs to the joined forces of neural and symbolic methods.

DLG4NLP Workshop @ NAACL2022: <https://dlg4nlp-workshop.github.io/dlg4nlp-naacl22>


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_naacl2022-gnn-nlp-activity-6955183243679711232-nunN).*
